mapper.select: SELECT s.*, (SELECT NVL(AVG(review_rating), 0) FROM review_tbl r WHERE r.store_id = s.store_id) AS storeRating, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_tbl r WHERE r.store_id = s.store_id) AS reviewCount FROM store_tbl s WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM menu_tbl m WHERE m.store_id = s.store_id ) ORDER BY storeRating DESC, store_id

SELECT store_id AS storeId, member_id AS memberId, store_name AS storeName, store_address AS storeAddress, store_phone AS storePhone, store_intro AS storeIntro, store_owner AS storeOwner, store_owner_address AS storeOwnerAddress, store_origin_info AS storeOriginInfo, store_owner_no AS storeOwnerNo, store_category AS storeCategory, (SELECT NVL(AVG(review_rating), 0) FROM review_tbl r WHERE r.store_id = s.store_id) AS storeRating, latitude AS LATITUDE, longitude AS LONGITUDE, store_thumb AS storeThumb, TO_CHAR(opening_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS openingDate FROM STORE_TBL s WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
select store_id from store_tbl where member_id = (select member_id from member_tbl where member_id = #{memberId})
SELECT menu_id, store_id, menu_name, menu_carbon, menu_price, menu_category, menu_image, menu_info, menu_status FROM MENU_TBL WHERE store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY menu_category ASC, menu_id ASC

SELECT o.option_no, o.option_type, o.option_name, o.option_price, o.option_carbon FROM OPTION_TBL o JOIN MENU_OPTION_MAP mom ON o.option_no = mom.option_no WHERE mom.menu_id = #{menuId} ORDER BY o.option_type ASC, o.option_no ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT order_seq.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO order_tbl ( order_id, member_id, store_id, used_point, get_point, order_status, delivery_type, delivery_address ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{memberId}, #{storeId}, #{usedPoint}, #{getPoint}, 0, #{deliveryType}, #{deliveryAddress} )
mapper.update: UPDATE member_tbl m SET m.member_point = m.member_point + ( SELECT o.get_point FROM order_tbl o WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId} AND o.member_id = m.member_id AND o.point_reward = 0 ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM order_tbl o WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId} AND o.member_id = m.member_id AND o.point_reward = 0 )

UPDATE member_tbl SET total_carbon_reduce = NVL(total_carbon_reduce, 0) + (SELECT NVL(get_point, 0) / 1000 FROM order_tbl WHERE order_id = #{orderId}) WHERE member_id = (SELECT member_id FROM order_tbl WHERE order_id = #{orderId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_detail (order_detail_id, order_id, menu_id, price, option_string, total_carbon, quantity) SELECT ORDER_DETAIL_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{orderId}, m.menu_id, #{orderItem.price}, #{orderItem.optionString, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, m.menu_carbon, #{orderItem.quantity} FROM menu_tbl m WHERE m.menu_id = #{orderItem.menuId}
mapper.update: update order_tbl set order_status = 1 where order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT od.menu_id AS menuId, m.menu_name AS menuName, m.menu_image AS menuImage, od.quantity, od.price, od.option_string AS optionString, CASE WHEN o.delivery_type = 1 THEN 0 WHEN o.delivery_type = 2 THEN 1000 WHEN o.delivery_type = 3 THEN 3000 ELSE 0 END AS deliveryFee FROM order_detail od JOIN order_tbl o ON od.order_id = o.order_id JOIN menu_tbl m ON od.menu_id = m.menu_id WHERE od.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY od.order_detail_id

SELECT s.store_name AS storeName, s.store_thumb AS storeThumb, s.store_id, o.member_id AS memberId, o.order_id AS orderId, o.used_point AS usedPoint, m.total_carbon_reduce AS totalReduceCarbon, o.get_point AS getPoint, o.delivery_address AS deliveryAddress, o.expected_time AS expectedTime, TO_CHAR(o.confirm_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS confirmDate, TO_CHAR(o.complete_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS completeDate, CASE WHEN o.delivery_type = 1 THEN 0 WHEN o.delivery_type = 2 THEN 1000 ELSE 3000 END AS deliveryPrice, o.delivery_type AS deliveryType, o.order_status AS orderStatus, TO_CHAR(olm.reg_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS orderDate FROM order_tbl o JOIN store_tbl s ON o.store_id = s.store_id JOIN member_tbl m ON o.member_id = m.member_id JOIN order_list_map olm ON o.order_id = olm.order_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT o.order_id AS orderId, o.store_id AS storeId, s.store_name AS storeName, s.store_thumb AS storeThumb, o.order_status AS orderStatus, o.get_point AS getPoint, o.review_status AS reviewStatus, TO_CHAR(olm.reg_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS orderDate,
-- 1. 합계 정보 od_sum.totalPrice AS totalPrice, od_sum.totalCount AS totalCount, od_sum.orderCarbon AS orderCarbon, (od_sum.totalCount - 1) AS extraCount,
-- 2. 대표 메뉴 정보 md.menu_name AS menuName, md.menu_image AS menuImage,
-- 3. 배달 및 주소 정보 o.delivery_type AS deliveryType, CASE WHEN o.delivery_type = 1 THEN 0 WHEN o.delivery_type = 2 THEN 1000 ELSE 3000 END AS deliveryPrice, s.store_address AS storeAddress, o.delivery_Address AS deliveryAddress
FROM order_tbl o JOIN store_tbl s ON o.store_id = s.store_id JOIN order_list_map olm ON o.order_id = olm.order_id JOIN member_tbl m ON o.member_id = m.member_id
-- 상세 합산 서브쿼리 JOIN (SELECT order_id, SUM(quantity) AS totalCount, SUM(price * quantity) AS totalPrice, SUM(total_carbon * quantity) AS orderCarbon FROM order_detail GROUP BY order_id) od_sum ON o.order_id = od_sum.order_id
-- 대표 메뉴 서브쿼리 JOIN (SELECT od1.* FROM order_detail od1 JOIN (SELECT order_id, MIN(order_detail_id) AS min_detail_id FROM order_detail GROUP BY order_id) x ON od1.order_id = x.order_id AND od1.order_detail_id = x.min_detail_id) od_first ON o.order_id = od_first.order_id
JOIN menu_tbl md ON od_first.menu_id = md.menu_id
WHERE o.member_id = #{memberId} and o.order_status > 0 ORDER BY o.order_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_comment_tbl (order_id, store_id, member_id, review_comment_content, review_comment_date) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{storeId}, #{memberId}, #{reviewCommentContent}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select:
SELECT r.order_id AS orderId, r.review_rating AS reviewRating, TO_CHAR(r.review_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS reviewDate, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.review_thumb AS reviewThumb, m.member_id AS memberId, m.member_thumb AS memberProfile,
rc.review_comment_content AS reviewCommentContent, TO_CHAR(rc.review_comment_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS reviewCommentDate,
(SELECT md.menu_name FROM order_detail od JOIN menu_tbl md ON od.menu_id = md.menu_id WHERE od.order_id = r.order_id AND ROWNUM = 1) AS menuName
FROM review_tbl r JOIN member_tbl m ON r.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN review_comment_tbl rc ON r.order_id = rc.order_id WHERE r.store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY r.review_date DESC

SELECT o.order_id AS orderId, o.store_id AS storeId, s.store_name AS storeName, s.store_thumb AS storeThumb, o.order_status AS orderStatus, m.member_phone AS memberPhone, o.delivery_address AS deliveryAddress, o.get_point AS getPoint, o.review_status AS reviewStatus, TO_CHAR(olm.reg_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS orderDate,
od_sum.totalPrice AS totalPrice, od_sum.totalCount AS totalCount, od_sum.orderCarbon AS orderCarbon, (od_sum.totalCount - 1) AS extraCount,
md.menu_name AS menuName, md.menu_image AS menuImage,
o.delivery_type AS deliveryType, CASE WHEN o.delivery_type = 1 THEN 0 WHEN o.delivery_type = 2 THEN 1000 ELSE 3000 END AS deliveryPrice, s.store_address AS storeAddress, m.member_addr AS deliveryAddress
FROM order_tbl o JOIN store_tbl s ON o.store_id = s.store_id JOIN order_list_map olm ON o.order_id = olm.order_id JOIN member_tbl m ON o.member_id = m.member_id
JOIN (SELECT order_id, SUM(quantity) AS totalCount, SUM(price * quantity) AS totalPrice, SUM(total_carbon * quantity) AS orderCarbon FROM order_detail GROUP BY order_id) od_sum ON o.order_id = od_sum.order_id
JOIN (SELECT od1.* FROM order_detail od1 JOIN (SELECT order_id, MIN(order_detail_id) AS min_detail_id FROM order_detail GROUP BY order_id) x ON od1.order_id = x.order_id AND od1.order_detail_id = x.min_detail_id) od_first ON o.order_id = od_first.order_id
JOIN menu_tbl md ON od_first.menu_id = md.menu_id
WHERE o.store_id = #{storeId} AND o.order_status > 0 ORDER BY o.order_id DESC
SELECT menu_image FROM menu_tbl WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}
SELECT store_id FROM store_tbl WHERE member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT deliveryType, SUM(orderTotal) AS seriesAmount, COUNT(order_id) AS orderCount FROM ( /* 주문(order_id)별로 각각 계산 */ SELECT o.order_id, o.DELIVERY_TYPE AS deliveryType, /* 해당 주문의 (메뉴 총합) + (배달비 1번) */ (SELECT SUM(od.PRICE * od.QUANTITY) FROM order_detail od WHERE od.order_id = o.order_id) + CASE WHEN o.DELIVERY_TYPE = 1 THEN 0 WHEN o.DELIVERY_TYPE = 2 THEN 1000 WHEN o.DELIVERY_TYPE = 3 THEN 3000 ELSE 0 END AS orderTotal FROM order_list_map m JOIN order_tbl o ON m.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.store_id = #{storeId} AND o.order_status = 5 AND TO_CHAR(m.reg_date, 'YYYY-MM') = #{yearMonth} GROUP BY o.order_id, o.DELIVERY_TYPE ) GROUP BY deliveryType ORDER BY deliveryType ASC

SELECT NVL(AVG(review_rating), 0) AS "avgRating", COUNT(*) AS "totalCount", COUNT(CASE WHEN review_rating = 5 THEN 1 END) AS "star5", COUNT(CASE WHEN review_rating = 4 THEN 1 END) AS "star4", COUNT(CASE WHEN review_rating = 3 THEN 1 END) AS "star3", COUNT(CASE WHEN review_rating = 2 THEN 1 END) AS "star2", COUNT(CASE WHEN review_rating = 1 THEN 1 END) AS "star1" FROM review_tbl WHERE store_id = #{storeId}

select to_char(olm.reg_date, 'yyyy-mm') as sale_month, sum(od.price * od.quantity) as total_sales from order_detail od join order_tbl o on od.order_id = o.order_id join order_list_map olm on o.order_id = olm.order_id where o.store_id = #{storeId} AND o.order_status = 5 group by to_char(olm.reg_date, 'yyyy-mm') order by sale_month
select sum(price * quantity) from order_detail where order_id in (select order_id from order_tbl where store_id = #{storeId} AND order_status = 5)
mapper.update:
UPDATE member_tbl m SET (member_point, total_carbon_reduce) = ( SELECT /* 1. 사용한 포인트는 무조건 복구 + 보상받은 포인트가 있다면 회수 */ m.member_point + o.used_point - (CASE WHEN o.point_reward = 1 THEN o.get_point ELSE 0 END),
/* 2. 탄소 절감량도 보상받은 적이 있을 때만 회수 (음수 방지) */ GREATEST(m.total_carbon_reduce - (CASE WHEN o.point_reward = 1 THEN (o.get_point / 1000.0) ELSE 0 END), 0) FROM order_tbl o WHERE o.member_id = m.member_id AND o.order_id = #{orderId} ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM order_tbl o WHERE o.member_id = m.member_id AND o.order_id = #{orderId} /* 상태가 취소(9)로 변할 때 실행되도록 서비스 로직에서 관리 */ )
UPDATE order_tbl SET order_status = 9 WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, open_time AS openTime, close_time AS closeTime, is_day_off AS isDayOff, week_of_month AS weekOfMonth FROM operating_hours_tbl WHERE store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY DECODE(UPPER(day_of_week), 'MON', 1, 'TUE', 2, 'WED', 3, 'THU', 4, 'FRI', 5, 'SAT', 6, 'SUN', 7)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO OPERATING_HOURS_TBL (HOUR_ID, STORE_ID, DAY_OF_WEEK, OPEN_TIME, CLOSE_TIME, IS_DAY_OFF, WEEK_OF_MONTH) VALUES (OPERATING_HOURS_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{storeId}, #{dayOfWeek}, #{openTime}, #{closeTime}, #{isDayOff}, #{weekOfMonth})
mapper.update: update order_tbl set point_reward = 1 where order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: select store_name, latitude, longitude from store_tbl where store_id = #{storeId}
